content:
Today’s 9to5Toys Lunch Break is headlined by another chance at the best price in months on AirPods Pro 3 after dropping back down to holiday pricing over the weekend. We also have the most affordable new 13-inch M5 MacBook Air back to one of the best prices ever, alongside the base 15-inch (nearly $150 off), and Apple Watch Series 11 at up to $130 off this week (one of the most notable deals on Series 11 yet). Be sure to stop by Best Buy’s Featured Top Deals of the Week that went live this morning and then head below for a closer look at everything.

AirPods Pro 3 just dropped back down to one of the best prices in months at Amazon

After jumping back up in price late Wednesday morning of last week, Amazon has once again dropped Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 back down to the lowest price in months.

Amazon is now offering the latest AirPods Pro 3 down at $199.99 shipped. Regularly $249, this is nearly $50 off the list price and the lowest we can find.

Today’s deal is on par with the last couple price drops we have tracked dating back to the Amazon Big Spring Sale and a couple times before that earlier in the year. But for folks who might have missed out or just weren’t ready to jump on it, the deal has returned.

We have had a relatively steady run of discounts on AirPods Pro 3 this year, just about all of which landing within $1 of the 2025 Black Friday/holiday price and providing a notable opportunity for those looking to land a set as we move through spring 2026.

The only notable chances we have really seen to score them for any less than that has been a few YMMV opportunities and an extremely limited shot when Amazon was price matching the Verizon store at $185. The latter has more or less delivered the lowest possible price so far, but again, it was very limited and very few folks had a chance to pull the trigger as Amazon had a hard time keeping that deal in-stock.

AirPods 4 are still down at the same $99 shipped we featured last week.

Most affordable new M5 MacBook Air model back to one of the best prices ever today (Nearly $150 off)

Earlier this month the all-time low pricing on Apple’s most affordable M5 MacBook Air starting to disappear long before the deals on the upgraded and more expensive models. However, as of the this morning, Amazon has brought back the all-time low pricing on 13-inch 16GB/512GB model on most colorways.

Amazon is now offering 13-inch M5 MacBook Air with 16GB if RAM and the 512GB SSD down at $949.99 shipped. This deal is live on the Midnight, Sky Blue, and Starlight models at the time of writing – we will keep an eye out for the silver variant.

You’re looking at the $1,099 entry model, the most affordable new M5 MacBook Air you can buy, landing within $1 of the lowest price we have tracked online since release in March at $149 off.

As mentioned above, we saw the entire lineup of M5 Airs at $150 off nearer the top of the month, but the particular configuration we are featuring here today was the first to jump back up closer to full price roughly 10 days ago or so. Today Amazon is bringing back that deal to give folks a chance to upgrade to the least expensive M5 MacBook Air you can buy.

This deal joins a series of ongoing $150 price drops across the lineup you’ll find below. Not every color in every configuration Amazon sells is down this low right now, but there are still plenty of other options now joining the entry model above.

  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/512GB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,549 (Reg. $1,699)

Base 15-inch M5 MacBook Air back at nearly $150 off in all colors, more

Apple Watch Series 11 up to $130 off this week with deals from $299

While we are still tracking on of the best Apple Watch Series 11 deals to date with the 46mm Cell models at up $130 off the list prices, but Amazon has also now brought back the $100 price drops on the base 4mm and 46mm models with deals starting from $299 shipped.

  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 $299 (Reg. $399)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 $329 (Reg. $429)
  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $499)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $529)

Amazon is now once again offering all of the base 42mm models at $299 shipped and the 46mm models at $329. This is $100 off the $399 and $429 list prices, on par with our previous mentions, and the lowest prices we can find. Outside of a couple extremely short-lived and fleeting offers on select colorways, you’re looking at a match of the lowest prices we have tracked on these models since release last September.

A perfect time to score one for mom or to accommodate/upgrade your spring/summer 2026 workout routine, catching the base GPS models at $100 off is a solid discount – they have basically never sold for less, save for a couple drops for a couple hours or so at Amazon, if that.

Having said all that, and as you can see in the list above, that 46mm GPS + Cell is still sitting at a particularly notable price since we spotted it last Friday afternoon. That’s $130 off and the same price as the smaller 42mm counterpart, an extremely rare chance to score one for better than $100 off, and easily one of the most notable Series 11 deals we have tracked to date.

We did see some of the high-end Titanium cases with the pricey Milanese Loop in the $150 off range for a brief time last month, but the $130 off on the aluminum Sport Band config we are highlighting here is now at the lowest we have tracked to date. This deal is not likely to stick around for much longer.

Best Buy’s Featured Top Deals of the Week now live: LG and Samsung OLED TVs from $600, appliance bundles $2,600 off, more

Today’s accessories and charging deals:

  • Woot’s updated Logitech sale is live at up to 70% off: Mac and gaming accessories from just $12
  • Save desk space and track using your thumb with Logitech’s Ergo M575S wireless mouse down at just $29
  • Apple charges $49 for a spare MagSafe 3 to USB-C cable, but LISEN gets you there for just $23.50 right now
  • Prop up your phone, latch it onto airplane trays, and more with this $10 mount (29% off)
  • Steal this tiny Anker 45W Nano USB-C charger for just $17 today, smart display model at $28

Best 2026 MacBook Pro deal: Least expensive M5 Pro now $200 off (Amazon all-time low)

As you can see in this week’s roundup of the best Apple deals on the net, the new MacBook Pro is front and center. This weekend is carrying a number of new all-time low prices on the 2026 lineup, ranging from some of the highest-end models you can buy at up to $400 off to the deal we are featuring here this morning – the best price ever on the new 14-inch 24GB/1TB model at $200 off.

This is the new entry point to the M5 Pro lineup. Apple upgraded the storage spec this generation, nixing the old 512GB entry setup for a 1TB SSD. This raised the starting price to $2,199, but it also means the latest 1TB model actually lands $200 less than the previous-generation model with comparable RAM and storage specs.

However, with Amazon now offering the 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro with 24GB of RAM and a 1TB internal SSD down at $1,999 shipped, it is even more affordable.

Regularly $2,199, this is $200 off the list price and the lowest price Amazon has ever offered it for. It is also $400 under the launch price on the 24GB/1TB M4 Pro MacBook Pro – the price of entry is technically more expensive this generation, but much less so with this deal and you get quite a bit more for your money here.

On top of that, the new models land with the latest N1 chip that enables Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6 support, an internal SSD Apple says is 2x faster than last time around, and Neural Accelerators in each core that help to deliver “up to 4x faster LLM prompt processing” and a 50% increase in graphics performance, compared to M4 Pro.

  • 14-inch M5 MacBook Pro 16GB/1TB from $1,549 (Reg. $1,699)
  • 14-inch M5 MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB from $1,756 (Reg. $1,899) – best price of the year
  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB $1,999 (Reg. $2,199) – new all-time low
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 48GB/1TB $2,899 (Reg. $3,099)
  • 14-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,364 (Reg. $3,599)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,699 (Reg. $3,899)

Apple’s 20-Core 2TB M5 Pro MacBook Pro hits new Amazon low, but you can score it for less right here ($170 off)
